channel.title: Llm-Orchestration on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Llm-Orchestration on Junho Lee

item.title: [Lecture] A 10-Step Roadmap for Designing Production-Ready AI Agents
item.description: Explore a 10-step open-source curriculum by a global software enterprise covering agent architectures, tool integration, and evaluation systems beyond simple chatbots.

item.title: Hands-On Notebooks for the Updated LangChain Ecosystem
item.description: With LangChain’s move to v1, legacy chain code has become outdated. A repository of Korean Jupyter notebooks walks through LangGraph’s State and Node design step by step.
